tasks.title: Fuzzy matching enhancement

tasks.context: Matcher at src/lib/agent/matcher.ts has similarity() function with hardcoded threshold 0.7. AgentAction model has matchConfidence Decimal? field. Pipeline passes classification.confidence but matcher doesn't use it.
steps: Read src/lib/agent/matcher.ts for current matchRecords() and similarity() logic
Add classificationConfidence param to matchRecords(): >=0.9→0.85, >=0.7→0.75, <0.7→0.65
Add multi-field fallback: when policy number fails, try name_similarity*0.6 + insurer_exact*0.4 >= 0.8
Update pipeline.ts to pass classification.confidence to matchRecords()
Ensure action-generator.ts writes matchConfidence to AgentAction
Run npx vitest run
criteria: matchRecords() uses dynamic threshold based on classificationConfidence

AgentAction.matchConfidence correctly recorded in DB

tasks.title: IMAP direct connect
tasks.description: Using superpower skills. New IMAP connector + poller + config API + UI + worker integration.
tasks.context: PRD §4.2 Mode B. ENG §2.2 IMAP Polling Worker. EmailIngressConfig model has provider, imapHost, imapPort, imapUsername, imapPasswordEncrypted fields. Create src/lib/email/imap/connector.ts — connectIMAP(host, port, username, password) using ImapFlow with TLS
Create src/lib/email/imap/poller.ts — pollIMAPConnection(config): connect → fetch unseen since lastPoll → parse → store → update lastPolledAt. 10 consecutive errors → status=error
Create POST /api/agent/oauth/imap/connect — test connection, encrypt credentials, save
Create POST /api/agent/oauth/imap/disconnect — clear config
Add IMAP section to config/page.tsx — server dropdown (Gmail/Outlook/Custom), email+password inputs, test button
Worker: add pollIMAPConnections() job, run every 60s
Run npx vitest run

Worker polls IMAP connections every 60s

tasks.title: Security audit
tasks.description: Using superpower skills. OWASP checks + PII leakage verification + dependency scan.
tasks.context: PRD §10 Non-Functional Requirements. ADR-013 PII Handling. All agent routes at src/app/api/agent/.
steps: Grep $queryRaw/$executeRaw for SQL injection — verify parameterized
Grep dangerouslySetInnerHTML for XSS — verify sanitization
Verify all mutation endpoints use POST/PUT/DELETE, no GET writes
Verify all agent endpoints have withAuth (except: oauth callbacks, health, ingest)
Create src/__tests__/unit/agent-pii-leakage.test.ts — verify LLM request body has no raw PII
Run npm audit --audit-level=high, fix high/critical
Run npx vitest run
criteria: No SQL injection vectors (all raw SQL parameterized)
No XSS vectors (no unsanitized dangerouslySetInnerHTML)
All agent endpoints authenticated (4 legitimate exemptions noted)
PII leakage test passes
npm audit shows 0 high/critical
npx vitest run shows 0 new failures

steps: Parallelize classify + desensitize in pipeline.ts using Promise.all
Check GET /api/agent/actions for N+1 queries, add proper includes
Check GET /api/agent/metrics — optimize to fewer DB round-trips
Make batch size configurable via AGENT_BATCH_SIZE env var (default 10)
Add concurrency limit to aggregateDailyMetrics() firm iteration (max 5 parallel)
